relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Walk in a way worthy of the calling.
Humility, gentleness, patience, and love hold the body together.
Guard the oneness of Spirit in the bond of peace.
One body and one Spirit carry one hope.
One Lord, one trust, one baptism.
One Divine and Father moves over, through, and in all.
Each receives grace by Messiah’s gift-measure.
The ascended one gives gifts to humans.
Ascent also implies descent into the depths.
The descended and ascended one fills all things.
Different gifts serve the body: apostles, prophets, good-news announcers, shepherds and teachers.
The gifts equip the holy ones for service and body-building.
The goal is mature humanity and fullness of Messiah.
No longer infants tossed by every wind of teaching.
Truth practiced in love grows the body into Messiah the head.
Every ligament and part contributes to love-built growth.
The old nations-walk in futile mind is left behind.
Darkened understanding and hardened heart alienate from Divine life.
Callousness turns desire into greed and excess.
But Messiah was not learned that way.
Truth is in Jesus.
The old human is put away.
The mind’s spirit is renewed.
The new human is put on in justice and holy truth.
Falsehood gives way to truth because we are members of one another.
Anger must not become misalignment or linger into darkness.
Do not give opportunity to the adversarial pattern.
Former taking becomes labor that can share with need.
Speech becomes grace-giving and body-building.
Do not grieve the Spirit who seals for release.
Bitterness, fury, shouting, slander, and harm are removed.
Kindness, tenderness, and gracious forgiveness become the body’s way.

contemplative_note: Ephesians 4 turns cosmic oneness into daily body practice: truthing in love, speech as grace, anger cleansed before nightfall, and each member building the whole.
